title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A video demonstration of Rocket 1.0, a platform designed to maintain context across multiple AI tools in a workflow. The video shows how Rocket addresses the problem of context loss when switching between tools like Perplexity, Claude, Cursor, and spreadsheets, and demonstrates building a startup MVP from idea to launch.
writeup: The video demonstrates Rocket 1.0, a platform built to preserve context as work moves across multiple AI tools, including Perplexity, Claude, Cursor, and spreadsheets. It frames the core problem as context loss when switching between separate tools in a workflow, and shows Rocket carrying that context through the process. As a worked example, it builds a startup MVP from initial idea to launch, touching on context management, cloud integration, low-code development, and AI agents.
